canonical_name: Stage A identifiability reopening audit (syllabary parameter recount)
research_question: Is the prior '259 parameters > 212 constraints => UNDERDETERMINED' budget correct, and if not what is the true identifiability deficit for a phonetic reading?
method_family: identifiability/information-budget audit (parameter & constraint counting from ontology + corpus inventories)
mechanical_verdict: A_REOPENED — prior 259>212 INVALIDATED as category error; corrected budget is count-favourable structurally (92<212) but value-informative-deficient (~2 vs 92, 46x)
data_sources_corpus_version: logos silver LA corpus (read-only from main worktree): signs_ontology.json + inscriptions_structured.json + inventory_syllabograms_{raw,conservative,exploratory}; corpus baseline 1341 raw inscriptions / 52 sites
source_dependencies: L_LA_CORPUS (single lineage: GORILA-derived silver corpus + ontology)
effective_n_independence_unit: 212 >=4-sign non-dominant-site structural inscriptions; 388 >=4-sign inscriptions total; independence unit = inscription (structural) vs held-out anchor (value); ~2 value-informative held-out anchors
features_channels: sign-inventory counts by class (syllabogram/logogram/fraction/damaged), allograph_family grouping, inscription length + site-dominance filters
algorithm_model: deterministic counting/enumeration over ontology classes and corpus inventories under multiple defensible specifications (no model fit)
search_space_params: parameter specifications enumerated: 259 all-stream-tokens / 131 raw syllabary / 123 allograph families / 92 conservative / 88 exploratory / 73 freq>=5 / 72 A-only / 59 AB-shared
candidate_languages_hypotheses: NOT_APPLICABLE (audit of parameter count, no language hypothesis)
preregistration_plan_hash: NOT_RECORDED (audit-only; SEARCH_RECEIPT stage_A charges 0 model families / 0 thresholds)
heldout_design: NOT_APPLICABLE (counting audit); flags that only ~2 value-informative constraints are held-out (the I, RI cross-script anchor pins)
null_family_run_count: NOT_APPLICABLE (no null model; references prior 4x distributional value-channel null)
primary_metric_value: syllabic parameters = 92 (conservative); structural constraints = 212; structural ratio 0.434; value-informative constraints = 2; value deficit = 46x
uncertainty: sensitivity across inventory specs (131/123/92/88/72); reduction without answer-fitting capped at 8 params
ablations_robustness: budget recomputed under 8 parameter specifications and multiple constraint filters (answer-neutral)
contamination_leakage: none (deterministic count of read-only artifacts; corpus never mutated, CA04)
licence_earned: none (favourable structural count explicitly NOT a licence — necessary not sufficient)
strongest_authorized_claim: The syllabary has ~92 free parameters (not 259); structurally the corpus is count-favourable; the true bottleneck is value-informativeness (~2 held-out anchors vs 92 params)
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the favourable 92<212 structural ratio is progress toward a reading, or that the corpus can supply the missing value constraints internally
limitations_blockers: Structural constraints do not inform sign values; ~90 additional value-informative constraints would be needed
supersession_relations: SUPERSEDES the earlier linear-a 12h campaign headline '259 params > 212 => UNDERDETERMINED' (bac88a5); recorded as INVALIDATED category error, non-retroactively (prior UNDERDETERMINED conclusion stands qualitatively)
verdict_ledger_reference: CAMPAIGN.md stage ledger (A_REOPENED); DECISION_LOG.md 2026-07-07 Stage A; data/stage_a_budget.json verdict field
record_confidence: VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT (all counts in data/stage_a_budget.json)

forbidden_stronger_claim: That allograph merges assign or constrain sign values
limitations_blockers: Representation-only; adds no value constraint
supersession_relations: Supports/confirms Stage A parameter recount

strongest_authorized_claim: Usable independent lexical evidence base is ~565 signatures, not 1341

uncertainty: CI excludes 0 (bigram over morph at lambda=0.9)

contamination_leakage: clean material; false-positive control demonstrates gate integrity

canonical_name: Stage F external-anchor re-audit (Salgarella non-circular check)
research_question: Does newly-available Salgarella 2020 (or any anchor class) supply >=3 independent, held-out, non-circular external anchors surviving leave-one-anchor-out?
method_family: external-anchor independence/circularity audit (Art. XII); leave-one-anchor-out framing
mechanical_verdict: NO_NONCIRCULAR_ANCHOR — Salgarella's A-B scheme is the shape/homomorphy channel (LB values projected backward, <=0.75 circularity cap, she flags it herself p.34/p.374 n.2, no held-out value test); her lexical IDs are the SAME toponyms/anthroponyms already REFUTEd; no class yields >=3 independent held-out non-circular anchors surviving LOTO
data_sources_corpus_version: Salgarella 2020 (corpus/bronze); Steele & Meissner 2017 Table 6.3; toponyms pa-i-to/se-to-i-ja/su-ki-ri-ta; anthroponyms qa-qa-ru, di-de-ru
source_dependencies: L_SIGN_HOMOMORPHY (circular — shape->LB values baked into transliteration); anchors trace to Steele & Meissner 2017 (same source behind Phase-2 REFUTE census)
effective_n_independence_unit: existing pins one-toponym-deep (I, RI); LOTO-fragile; <3 independent anchors any class
features_channels: sign-shape homomorphy grades, toponym/anthroponym lexical identifications
algorithm_model: audit of anchor independence + circularity; no new one-shot run (the two frozen preregistered one-shots NOT re-run)
candidate_languages_hypotheses: Greek/Cretan toponyms & anthroponyms (as anchors) — all circular/one-deep
preregistration_plan_hash: two immutable prior preregistrations referenced: DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21168887 and 21173639 (frozen, NOT re-run)
heldout_design: leave-one-anchor-out (LOTO) as the standard the anchors must survive — none do (existing pins one-toponym-deep)
positive_negative_controls: prior cross-script gate returned REFUTE_LOTO_FRAGILE; distributional channel 0.0 (4x)
null_family_run_count: references 2 frozen preregistered REFUTEs; no new null run
primary_metric_value: 0 anchor classes with >=3 independent held-out non-circular anchors; existing pins one-toponym-deep; Salgarella circularity cap <=0.75
power: no non-circular anchor set exists to power a value test -> NO_POWER for the value lever
ablations_robustness: checked all anchor classes (toponyms, anthroponyms, homomorphy)
contamination_leakage: core finding: Salgarella channel is circular (LB values already in the transliteration); would leak if treated as independent
strongest_authorized_claim: No independent, held-out, non-circular external anchor set exists; Salgarella 'moves rows, not verdicts'
forbidden_stronger_claim: That shape homomorphy or the known toponym pins constitute a valid held-out phonetic anchor
limitations_blockers: The load-bearing value lever is absent/circular — the campaign's decisive external blocker
supersession_relations: Un-blocks and closes the standing 'Salgarella 2020 absent/paywalled' item as circular; consistent with prior REFUTE_LOTO_FRAGILE
verdict_ledger_reference: CAMPAIGN.md Stage F (NO_NONCIRCULAR_ANCHOR); DECISION_LOG.md Stage E+F; Stage L table
record_confidence: REPORT_ONLY (circularity cap 0.75, one-deep pins, page cites in EF report md; DOIs referenced but one-shots not re-run; underlying REFUTE artifacts in prior tree)

canonical_name: Stage H agnostic internal value-search relabeling-invariance null
research_question: Can any agnostic search over the corpus's internal (distributional/phonotactic) evidence rank one sign-value assignment above another?
method_family: invariance proof (relabeling-invariance of held-out likelihood) + empirical confirmation
mechanical_verdict: PROVABLE_NULL — held-out bigram log-likelihood is IDENTICAL (-4.172251) across all 30 random sign-value bijections (range <1e-9); a sign-value assignment is a relabeling, and internal structure is relabeling-invariant, so no agnostic internal search can rank value maps
data_sources_corpus_version: silver LA inscriptions_structured.json; 1369 multi-sign sequences; 156 distinct signs; SEED=20260707
effective_n_independence_unit: 1369 multi-sign sequences; held-out split; 156-sign relabeling group
features_channels: phonotactic bigram over signs; held-out sequence log-likelihood
algorithm_model: fit phonotactic bigram, score held-out under 30 random sign-value bijections, measure LL variance (stage_hj_agnostic_null.py)
search_space_params: 30 random bijections over 156 signs (proof, not a decipherment sweep)
candidate_languages_hypotheses: NONE (proof that internal evidence cannot select any)
preregistration_plan_hash: NOT_RECORDED (deterministic confirmation of a proof; no multiplicity — no unbounded search run)
heldout_design: held-out sequence likelihood under relabeling; variance across 30 maps
positive_negative_controls: the invariance itself is the control (LL variance = 0 by construction)
null_family_run_count: 30 random value-maps (LL identical); grounded on D2 relabeling-invariance
multiplicity_correction: NOT_APPLICABLE (no search charged; forbidden unbounded search NOT run)
primary_metric_value: held-out bigram LL = -4.172251 identical across 30 maps (min=max, range<1e-9)
contamination_leakage: none (proof from structure)
licence_earned: none (proves the internal value channel is unearnable)
strongest_authorized_claim: Internal Linear A evidence is value-blind: no agnostic internal method can inform sign values; the value-layer underdetermination is permanent for internal methods
forbidden_stronger_claim: That Linear A is uncrackable (external anchors/bilingual remain viable); or that any internal ranking exists
limitations_blockers: Only external value-bearing evidence can break the invariance
supersession_relations: Builds on D2; underpins the campaign's headline 'internal evidence value-blind'; supersedes prior 'more inscriptions would help' framing for the value layer
verdict_ledger_reference: CAMPAIGN.md Stage H (PROVABLE_NULL); data/stage_hj_null.json (stage_H_verdict); CHECKPOINT_3_EL.md
record_confidence: VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT (LL -4.172251 identical across 30 maps, 1369 seqs, 156 signs in data/stage_hj_null.json)

limitations_blockers: Only external anchors/bilingual could beat the gate

NON-unlocks: more LA inscriptions / better internal models / allograph refinement (~0 value info — value-blind)
